fields.evidence_summary: FINAL/RESTORED CLOSEOUT as of 2026-05-14: WBS09 Airtable native view verification is closed as operator-accepted complete with the automation limitation now proven, not assumed. The previously reopened condition was resolved by read-only chatgpt-exec Airtable metadata probe 003. Probe succeeded using GitHub Actions secrets and tracked summary output; it read 22 tables, 95 total views, and 73 WBS09/GVWI views. Airtable Web API-accessible view metadata exposed only id, name, and type, with no saved filter/sort/group/visible-field-order properties. Therefore strict automated verification of native Airtable saved view settings is not available through this API route. Basis for closeout: original governed manifest and prior batch/tool evidence, late manual checks for Operator Tools Registry / DCOIR Cleanup WBS / DCOIR Cleanup Scaffold Registry, GVWI-01 through GVWI-08 manual checks and manifest alignment, Operator Tools Registry cleanliness sweep, corrected chatgpt-exec readback contract, successful metadata probe proving API limitation, and operator acceptance to close without further manual per-view checking.
